html:
Exclusive to:

GenericCold

The Heat Gland is a Food item dropped by Geothermites. It is used to craft the Ardent Axe, Heated Garden Hoe, Hotheaded Hammer, Pyretic Pickaxe, Searing Shovel, Coals, and Thermal Balm. It can also be consumed to restore Health and Hunger at the cost of Sanity. Also, it gradually raises body temperature by a total of 60°C over the course of 60 seconds.

Heat Gland can be given to the Pig King in exchange for 1 Gold Nugget each.

Cooked Heat Gland

Cooked Heat Gland can be obtained by cooking Heat Gland on the fire. Eating the Cooked Heat Gland restores more health than raw and does not cause overheating debuff. However, it cannot be used to craft any items.

Cooked Heat Gland can be given to the Pig King in exchange for 1 Gold Nugget each.

Trivia

  • The Heat Gland was added in Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.
  • The "Cold" quotes of Heat Gland are likely unused.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Exclusive to:
GenericCold
“I guess those mites weren't just full of hot air.”
–Wilson
“Gross. But at least it's good and hot!”
–Willow
“Is hot guts of gassy bug.”
–Wolfgang
“It still possesses the warmth of life.”
–Wendy
“STEAMING HOT ORGANIC INSIDES”
–WX-78
“It gives off a substantial amount of heat.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's nice and warm. Not exactly something I wanna cuddle up to, though.”
–Woodie
“Hot to the touch.”
–Maxwell
“It hölds the fire öf Lögi within it.”
–Wigfrid
“That's hot!!”
–Webber
“I almost need oven mitts to hold it.”
–Warly
“Warm!”
–Wormwood
“You've heard of a warm heart, how 'bout a hot spleen?”
–Winona
“Will a bite warm me up? It just mite!”
–Wortox
“Blegh!! Nasty bug guts!”
–Wurt
“A great hot glob of greasy Geothermite guts!”
–Walter
“It's like a disgusting hot water bottle.”
–Wanda
“It's gone cold.”
–Wilson
“Better heat it up again.”
–Willow
“Cold guts of bug.”
–Wolfgang
“Cold and lifeless.”
–Wendy
“HEAT DEPLETED”
–WX-78
“It seems that its reserves of heat are finite.”
–Wickerbottom
“Ice cold.”
–Woodie
“It has grown cold.”
–Maxwell
“It burns nö möre.”
–Wigfrid
“It's not even warm anymore.”
–Webber
“Ah. I let it get cold.”
–Warly
“Oh... where warm go?”
–Wormwood
“It ran outta heat.”
–Winona
“Old and cold!”
–Wortox
“Cold bug guts.”
–Wurt
“It's all cooled off.”
–Walter
“Now it's just disgusting.”
–Wanda
The Heat Gland is a Food item dropped by Geothermites. It is used to craft the Ardent Axe, Heated Garden Hoe, Hotheaded Hammer, Pyretic Pickaxe, Searing Shovel, Coals, and Thermal Balm. It can also be consumed to restore Health and Hunger at the cost of Sanity. Also, it gradually raises body temperature by a total of 60°C over the course of 60 seconds.
Heat Gland can be given to the Pig King in exchange for 1 Gold Nugget each.

“I cooked it... but do I really want to eat it?”
–Wilson
“Ooooh, looks spicy!”
–Willow
“Little cooked guts has powerful spice smell...”
–Wolfgang
“It has an overpowering, spicy smell...”
–Wendy
“WARNING: CENTER IS EXTREMELY HOT”
–WX-78
“I suspect it may not be wise to eat such a thing.”
–Wickerbottom
“Eh... y'know, I'm not feelin' so hungry anymore.”
–Woodie
“It looks as though it would wreak havoc on my digestion.”
–Maxwell
“Röasted entrails.”
–Wigfrid
“Will we burn ourselves if we eat it?”
–Webber
“It certainly has an intriguing aroma...”
–Warly
“Oh! Very hot!”
–Wormwood
“Smells like it packs a punch.”
–Winona
“Fried insides, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Glurgh. Nuh-uh.”
–Wurt
“I just need to be careful not to burn my tongue.”
–Walter
“It looks dangerously spicy.”
–Wanda
Cooked Heat Gland can be obtained by cooking Heat Gland on the fire. Eating the Cooked Heat Gland restores more health than raw and does not cause overheating debuff. However, it cannot be used to craft any items.
Cooked Heat Gland can be given to the Pig King in exchange for 1 Gold Nugget each.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tuyến Nhiệt là một Thực phẩm rơi ra từ Geothermites. Nó được sử dụng để chế tạo Rìu hăng , Cuốc làm vườn nóng , Búa nóng , Cuốc lửa , Xẻng đốt , Than và Dầu dưỡng nhiệt . Nó cũng có thể được sử dụng để phục hồi Máu và Sức Đói với cái giá là Tinh Thần. Ngoài ra, nó còn làm tăng dần nhiệt độ cơ thể lên tổng cộng 60°C trong vòng 60 giây.

The '''Heat Gland''' is a [[Food]] item dropped by [[Geothermite]]s. It is used to craft the [[Ardent Axe]], [[Heated Garden Hoe]], [[Hotheaded Hammer]], [[Pyretic Pickaxe]], [[Searing Shovel]], [[Coals]], and [[Thermal Balm]]. It can also be consumed to restore Health and Hunger at the cost of Sanity. Also, it gradually raises body temperature by a total of 60°C over the course of 60 seconds.

Heat Gland can be given to the [[Pig King/DST|Pig King]] in exchange for 1 Gold Nugget each.
